summary.Task: Two identical spheres of radius 0.2 m and density 1.0 are placed with centers 1 m apart. Apply a 2 N force on each sphere directed toward the other. Use collision detection when they meet, then apply a tangential force at the surface to generate torque. Retrieve both torque and angular momentum after the collision.
summary.Scene Type: Toy Scene: Checking Simulator's and Overall Pipeline Functionality
